recommendation.summary: All categories at zero with only two days left in Ann Arbor — the AWS Agentic AI Summit is tonight (4pm PDT, but it's a good remote-networking watch even from Michigan) and the Ann Arbor Art Fair runs through tomorrow, July 17, so today and tomorrow are the last chance to bank culture and professional hours there before the trip ends. Pair a YMCA session with the Art Fair's free Summer Sounds concert tonight to hit health and culture in one evening.

suggested.title: SavvyMoney — Program Manager, Enterprise AI Adoption (new posting, $160K–$175K, remote-eligible)
Ann Arbor YMCA — morning workout before the heat peaks (400 W Washington St, open 5:30 AM)
Summer Sounds at the Ann Arbor Art Fair — Schmaltz & Jill Jack (free, tonight 6pm, The Stage on Main)
